item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested local reminder patch, frames the repeated pattern as downstream information overlays after each new miss, moves upstream to a unified pre-submission compliance gate covering time, attachment, format, and citation/page completeness, and proposes consolidation/structural redesign rather than adding another prompt."}
